text_excerpt: Contact - Luke Charters MP for York Outer Skip to content Home Find Help Community and Environmental Issues Education Healthcare Parliamentary and Policy Issues Local Government and Public Services Other Matters My Work News About Contact Stay updated on social media Facebook-f X-twitter Youtube Instagram Contact Scroll to find out about how I can help you Please note that due to strict Parliamentary protocol, I am only able to make enquiries on behalf of my own, York Outer, constituents. To check if you live in my constituency, check your MP here Here’s how I can help you: As your MP I can help with a variety of issues and concerns. First steps Keeping the issue private, I can write to the relevant department, official, or Minister or make a personal appointment to discuss the issue. This can often go a long way to providing a solution to your issue. Making the issue public I can also help to make the issue public by raising it in the House of Commons, where it will be officially recorded, and could potentially come to the attention of the press and public. Outside Parliament Outside Parliament, you can request that I speak at an event concerning your issue, pledge my support to a campaign or write to the local media on your behalf. Friday 21st November Time 12:30 - 13:30 - Online Due to security reasons, I cannot advertise the location of my advice surgeries in advance. Those given a slot will be given the location. I rotate my surgeries around the constituency to cover all of our communities. My next surgery: Book an appointment I hold monthly advice surgeries, rotating around the constituency. They are by appointment only. To make an appointment please send an email using the contact form. Fill in this form to get in touch Description Organiser First Line of Address Postcode Mobile Email Address Submit form Get in contact my office: Email address [email protected] Address PO Box. 894, York, YO31 6HP Phone Number 01904 463 444 Meetings & Events I enjoy visiting local groups, organisations, businesses and schools in York Outer. Please consider inviting me to your meeting or event, but understand that it will not always be possible, due to my parliamentary and other commitments.
